problem id: ef37f544
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) AND SHL(5)

examples:
  00000100 -> 00000000
  00110010 -> 01000000
  10001010 -> 00000000
  01011111 -> 01100000
  11001110 -> 00000000
  11101010 -> 00000000
  11111000 -> 00000000
  01111001 -> 00100000
  00001000 -> 00000000

query: 11100101
predicted answer: 10000000
